svg.text:
"tokens.json
47 tokens: colors, typography,
spacing, borderRadius, shadows,
breakpoints, transitions, zIndex"

"tailwind-preset.js
Maps tokens to Tailwind utilities
Overrides font-sans with monospace
Custom gradients + grid patterns"

"Prompt Template
1. Product name (first sentence)
2. Full DESIGN SYSTEM spec
3. LAYOUT description
4. KEY ELEMENTS list
5. INTERACTIVE STATES"

"Visual review:
Colors correct?
Font = monospace?
Border radius = 0px?
Brand name correct?"

"5 Component Primitives
Button (CVA, 8 variants)
Card (accent, hoverable)
Input (label, error, icons)
Tabs (3 variants + scrollable)
Badge (16 variants)"

"21 Screen Components
All with data-testid attributes
All using design token classes
All importing from primitives"

"data-testid Architecture
Planned before generation:
hero, hero-headline,
cta-explore, category-grid,
resource-card, admin-tabs,
tab-overview ... tab-reports"

"107 Validation Actions
7 action types:
navigate, screenshot,
waitForSelector, assert,
evaluate, click, fill"
